title: Fed cuts rates by end of Q1 2026
question_text: Will the US Federal Reserve cut the federal funds target range at or before its March 2026 FOMC meeting?
resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if the FOMC announces a reduction to the target range on or before 2026-03-31; NO otherwise.
edge_cases: An emergency inter-meeting cut before the deadline also resolves YES. A hike or hold resolves NO.
